title: Super Metroid
platform_style_description: SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
environment: an alien cavern with organic pillars and cold glowing elements
action_mood_cue: standing alert in hostile silence under atmospheric light
composition: centered figure, deep cavern layers, sparse but readable glowing forms
memory_hook: exploration, alien solitude, and hostile vertical space
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A lone armored explorer in an alien cavern with organic pillars and cold glowing elements, standing alert in hostile silence under atmospheric light.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- isolated, mysterious, alien

Composition:
- centered figure, deep cavern layers, sparse but readable glowing forms
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Samus suit likeness, avoid Metroid creature silhouette, avoid Chozo-like symbols, avoid resemblance to metroid

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
